metadata.description: Marketplace for the ifl-ios-standards plugin (Boardy+VIP iOS standards, agents, and scaffolders).

plugins.name: ifl-ios-standards
plugins.description: Boardy+VIP iOS architecture standards: 10 specialist agents, pattern-neutral brain process-stage skills (incl. brain-flow end-to-end automation), a QUICK_REF task router skill + clustered boardy task skills, the full rulebook/specs as bundled reference, and Bazel module/board scaffolders on PATH.
